title: AI Regulation and Tech Shakeups

slides.headline: AI Regulation and Tech Shakeups
slides.subtitle: The biggest tech updates you need to know today, explained in plain English.

slides.headline: Proposed AI Kill Switch
slides.explanation: US lawmakers are discussing a new bill that would allow the government to shut down AI models deemed a public threat. This could change how companies develop powerful new tech if safety concerns arise.

slides.headline: A Smarter Alexa is Coming
slides.explanation: Amazon is testing an update for Alexa Plus that connects more easily with smart home devices like vacuums and locks. It aims to make controlling your home gadgets feel more seamless.

slides.headline: Tesla Robotaxi Reality Check
slides.explanation: Elon Musk recently discussed the progress of Tesla's robotaxi program despite some skepticism about the current state of the tech. Investors are watching closely to see if the company can match its ambitious promises.

slides.headline: Musk Addresses Public Criticism
slides.explanation: In a new interview, Elon Musk spoke about his public image and recent controversies surrounding his leadership. It offers a rare look at his perspective as AI fears continue to grow in the industry.

slides.headline: Patreon Cuts 20 Percent of Staff
slides.explanation: Patreon is laying off 93 employees as the company adjusts to a changing tech landscape. The CEO noted that while AI is not replacing humans, it has fundamentally shifted how the industry operates.

caption:
From government oversight on AI to major shifts in the creator economy, here is what is moving the needle in tech today. We break down the updates so you can stay informed without the noise. Which of these stories are you keeping an eye on?

Follow @headlinne for a daily brief. More at HEADLINNE.com.

title: Oil Prices Spike and Markets Wobble

slides.headline: Oil Prices Spike and Markets Wobble
slides.subtitle: Five quick updates on the economy you need to know today.

slides.headline: New Tariffs Target Forced Labour
slides.explanation: The US is placing tariffs on about 60 trade partners for failing to stop forced labour imports. This move aims to tighten global supply chain standards.

slides.headline: Oil Prices Top $100 a Barrel
slides.explanation: Brent crude jumped over 6 percent today as conflict in the Middle East escalates. Higher oil prices often lead to increased costs for consumers at the pump.

slides.headline: Investors Brace for Market Swings
slides.explanation: S&P 500 signals suggest traders are preparing for big price moves in tech giants like Apple and Meta. These stocks often dictate the direction of the broader market.

slides.headline: AI Competition Hits ServiceNow Stock
slides.explanation: ServiceNow beat earnings expectations, but the stock fell due to fears about new competition from OpenAI. It shows how even successful tech companies are vulnerable to rapid AI shifts.

slides.headline: Fed Rate Hike Odds Are Rising
slides.explanation: Rising oil prices are pushing investors to bet on an interest rate hike from the Federal Reserve in September. A hike would make borrowing money more expensive for everyone.

caption:
From oil prices hitting a major milestone to shifting expectations for the Federal Reserve, it has been a busy day for the markets. We have rounded up the five biggest finance stories you need to catch up on right now. Which of these headlines caught you off guard today?

Follow @headlinne for a daily brief. More at HEADLINNE.com.
